finding_log.finding: Implementation should not start in the shared worktree until the active TASK-0178 agent's install and registry edits settle, or the builder uses a separate worktree and performs conflict review. The ticket now names this as a blocker in the body while preserving valid frontmatter.

implementation-plan.next_action: Approve or revise the rendered-install strategy before implementation.

findings: Active concurrent edits in install and registry surfaces are the main readiness caveat; the ticket explicitly gates implementation coordination.
integration-readiness.next_action: Coordinate with TASK-0178 before editing overlapping installer and registry files.

evidence-quality.next_action: During implementation, attach test outputs and the agent-behavior-test canary under TASK-0181 artifacts.

next_action: Keep TASK-0181 in review until the operator approves the rendered-skill install design and the active TASK-0178 edits are coordinated.
